definition: Capacity of a strategy to reduce harm protect critical functions and lower exposure
measurement_note: Use hazard reduction service continuity health safety and recovery evidence

definition: Fairness in distribution of risks resources protections and recovery benefits
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery affordability access aid and protection indicators

definition: Quality of participation transparency institutional trust authority sharing and public reasoning
measurement_note: Use participation depth decision records public review appeal mechanisms and trust indicators

definition: Recognition of histories identities culture local knowledge Indigenous rights disability access and lived experience
measurement_note: Use language access cultural review local knowledge integration rights review and qualitative evidence

definition: Clarity of responsibility corrective action public reporting legal duties funding and review
measurement_note: Use responsibility matrices audit logs corrective action completion deadlines and public reporting

definition: Degree to which a strategy shifts cost risk displacement labor surveillance debt or loss onto vulnerable groups
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because protection is achieved through unfair transfer

definition: Administrative technical financial political and participation burden required to implement the strategy
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized when capacity is constrained
